name: vobiz
description: Build Vobiz voice, SIP, phone-number, WhatsApp, and AI-agent integrations with 13 domain skills and the current Vobiz Docs MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Vobiz skills and current Docs MCP context
interface.longDescription: Use 13 focused implementation skills for voice calls, SIP trunks, phone numbers, VobizXML, audio streams, WhatsApp, partner accounts, and AI voice agents. The public Vobiz Docs MCP server supplies current documentation over Streamable HTTP without requiring credentials.
defaultPrompt: Use Vobiz to build an outbound voice call integration.
Use Vobiz to create a SIP trunk and connect an AI voice agent.
